case_title: PARKER WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS VS. AMILCAR ESCOBAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED DEC-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, AMILCAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,057.00 FILED BY WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS, PARKER AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, AMILCAR TATUM, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-02-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PARKER WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ROCHELLE SCHOTT. DEFENDANT AMILCAR ESCOBAR IS NOT PRESENT(PASSED). DEFENDANT ALICE TATUM IS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO INCLUDE THE DRIVER OF THE VEHICLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAR-03-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PARKER WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALICE TATUM IS PRESENT. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-24-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. (D.506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-22-22.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JUL-22-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PARKER WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMILCAR ESCOBAR IS NOT PRESENT(PASSED). DEFENDANT ALICE TATUM IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 SERVED DEC-22-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TATUM, ALICE
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO AMEND CLAIM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINDESHEIM-ZIGAS, PARKER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, AMILCAR TATUM, ALICE DEFENDANT TATUM IS NOT VICARIOUSLY LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT CAUSED BY THE ROOFING CONTRACTOR, DEFENDANT ESCOBAR. THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT TATUM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT ESCOBAR PROPERLY SERVED BUT PASSED AWAY BY THE TIME OF THE HEARING; IS LIABLE FOR THE DAMAGES. HOWEVER, THE COURT CANNOT ENTER A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE DECEDENT. PLAINTIFF IS REFERRED TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 366.2. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
